name: Scheduled Task Deletion
description: Deletion of a scheduled task is detected using schtasks utility with delete command.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Scheduled Task Deletion'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WindowsSysmon event_id=1 image='*\schtasks.exe' command='*delete*'`.
